description: Batch size and flush interval optimization tests (Part 2 requirement). Run each configuration with 500,000 messages and record throughput, latency, and DB write stats.

tests.notes: Small batch, fast flush – low latency, higher write overhead
Default configuration – balanced throughput and latency
Large batch, moderate flush – higher throughput, increased latency
Maximum batch size – highest throughput, highest per-message latency
Large batch with aggressive flush – high throughput with tighter latency bound
